name: Oatmeal Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the boiling water, oatmeal, margarine, brown sugar, and sugar.
2. Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9" x 13" pan.
4. Bake for 30-40 minutes at 350°F.
5. Combine the topping ingredients: brown sugar, shredded coconut, chopped nuts, milk or water, melted margarine, and vanilla.
6. Spread the topping mixture over the hot cake.
7. Broil until the topping is lightly browned, being careful not to burn it.
